narrative:
Rome Twp. township has 6,380 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
